title: Remove Stale Compatibility And Migration Residue
summary: Deletes stale compatibility imports, migration-era glue, and dead edge-case support that no longer protects active contracts.
scope_items: Identify and remove compatibility or migration-era surfaces that survive only because earlier cutovers were staged.
Keep remaining shims only where a current boundary or operator contract still depends on them.
done_when_items: Stale compatibility and migration residue is materially reduced across the highest-confusion code paths.
Any retained residue is documented with an explicit active contract reason.
